note: v1.2 — measured rates: b0=24% organic (6/25, scaled per board by audience quality q vs anchor 0.284, clamp [0.002,0.24]); b1=9.4% (16/170 random); b2=28% (14/50 random); b3=60% assumed. Bucket means winsorized at $10M midpoint so single whales do not distort extrapolation (whales still count fully in researched floors). total = floor + remainder x share x rate x mean.
